title: Template for Outlook Calendar Integration

posts.author: kirsten (Kirsten)
posts.cookedHtml: I appreciate the integration feature between outlook calendar and Monday, but I was wondering if a template could be created to help organize the events on the calendar. Currently, if I add columns to the body of my outlook calendar, the integration simply dumps all the text together. As I have lots of different event details going in at once, I would love a template added to the integration so that the columns will populate in an organized manner to the outlook calendar.
